finding_results.notes: Replaced three stacked thesis lines with broken speech. 'He didn't want the answer. He wanted credit for asking' replaced with deflated realization ('And I just — sat there thinking, oh. Okay. That's what this is.'). 'And Marc isn't unique' now breaks mid-sentence ('And Marc's not—') with a restart. 'People think being visible is the same as being known' aphorism removed entirely, replaced with unfinished turn ('I'm just—' She shook her head. Didn't finish.). Marc anecdote and Tuesday-night cereal detail preserved. Loneliness arrives through concrete specifics and broken rhythm, not abstract slogans.

Replaced 'The shrimp was decent' (style-bible calibration echo) with 'You weren't entirely wrong' — a dry diplomatic concession that preserves Damian's restrained banter without reusing the shrimp/decent food beat from the calibration line.

summary: Two dialogue findings addressed. Becky's terrace confession roughened: three polished thesis lines replaced with visible hesitation (mid-sentence break and restart at line 347), deflated realization instead of aphoristic diagnosis (line 343), and an unfinished turn replacing the visibility/knowledge aphorism (line 351). Damian's style-bible example echo replaced with a non-food diplomatic concession that preserves his register.
